name: stable_unfold_intensional_bridge
reason: stable_unfold is external_body bridging stable(p)'s nested closure (p.implies(always(p)) wrapped in TempPred::new) to a bare implication with forall — intensionally distinct formulations equated without proof

name: stable_and_valid
